temperature_latest.json.description: Per-market latest temperature: overall + valuation/sentiment/liquidity sub-temps + 1-week change attribution.

indicators_latest.json.description: All underlying factor latest values and rolling percentiles (5y/10y).

divergence_latest.json.description: Active divergence signals from the last 90 days, sorted by strength.

temperature_history.json.gz.description: Per-market full daily history of overall + sub-temps. Gzipped JSON.

manifest.json.description: Schema version, asof date, and inventory of all endpoints.
